title: Stuff you DONT want to see in 30 40
display_title: Stuff you DONT want to see in 30 40
wikitext:
[]: Stuff you DON´T want to see in 3.0/4.0 Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sun Apr 24, 2011 2:38 pm I love you, mom.

[]: Post by Stryker » Sun Apr 24, 2011 2:50 pm I dun get it. Is he mistaking Rei for Yui? Btw, everything you say here will be put in by Anno, because he's mean like that.

[]: Post by MegucaMagica » Sun Apr 24, 2011 3:03 pm [URL=http://img594.imageshack.us/i/kaworu3.jpg/] [/URL] Less "I love you" and more "please kill me"

[]: Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Apr 24, 2011 3:06 pm 1) Excessive fanservice (we get it, ha ha, enough already) 2) More rushed and unfocused pacing 3) An overly tidy conclusion ( Evangelion needs it some ambiguity!!)

[]: Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Apr 24, 2011 3:09 pm MegucaMagica wrote: Less "I love you" and more "please kill me"

[]: Post by Kaiserjagen » Sun Apr 24, 2011 3:43 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: Which one? Do you want less of the first or vice versa?

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sun Apr 24, 2011 3:57 pm S/A. ...Okay, that one was a joke XD But please, please, nothing like EMK. Oh, and explain the first post.

[]: Post by Shogo-Kun » Sun Apr 24, 2011 4:01 pm A suicide feul ending. We don't need another EoE.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sun Apr 24, 2011 5:06 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: A suicide feul ending. We don't need another EoE.

[]: Post by katastroff » Sun Apr 24, 2011 5:26 pm I have no idea what ending I want, but definitely not exactly like EoE or Tengen Toppa Gurren Lagann (which is where it seems to lean towards). Somewhere in between perhaps? Oh, and please do not end off with "Rebuild is a sequel!" twist.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Apr 24, 2011 6:51 pm Just one thing. Kaworu for more than 15 minutes. Though I have accepted Kaworu is probably going to get as much screentime in the next film as Asuka got in 2.0

[]: Post by Clover » Sun Apr 24, 2011 7:06 pm Deep nonsense. EoE is my favorite movie ever, but I want to see the Evas kick ass and win shit. I want a Gurren Lagann ending where things go back to normal, but with a heavy price. It can be kill em all, just take the apocalypse out.

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Sun Apr 24, 2011 7:06 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AA0xZv0Hx9g

[]: Post by Knuckles » Sun Apr 24, 2011 7:19 pm Clover wrote: Deep nonsense. EoE is my favorite movie ever, but I want to see the Evas kick ass and win shit. I want a Gurren Lagann ending where things go back to normal, but with a heavy price. It can be kill em all, just take the apocalypse out.

[]: Post by BC Baron » Sun Apr 24, 2011 8:12 pm So the topic is stuff I DON´T want to see in 3.0/4.0? Okay, here goes. Just a few off the top of my head: Gendo, SEELE, or Yui survive. In any capacity whatsoever. They made their choices and messed around with the future of the human race quite enough for one lifetime, thank you very much. Time for them to exit, stage left; ASAP; for good; permanently. Misato's and Shinji's generations won't have any legitimate chance to finally get their respective shit together and move on if any of the old men/women are still around, getting in the way. Rei sacrificed/merged with Lilith, Adam or any other Seed that just happens to be lying around. Kaji killed by anybody. He's way too skilled of a triple agent to let some mere NERV/SEELE hack take him down. Mari Illustrious Makinami revealing any further double-secret probationary, previously hidden, back-door Eva "modes". Once is more than enough. Please stop showing off. Onanism - Depression and guilt seldom equate to horniness (please just take my word for it). Alright, let's move on. MP Evas that have the ability to regenerate. That's complete BS. Asuka kicked all of their asses fair and square (until they decided to cheat, that is). Shinji continuing to refer to Gendo as "Dad".

[]: Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Apr 24, 2011 8:19 pm But what would Evangelion be without all that postmodern craziness?? Just another giant robot show, that's what! Okay, maybe not, but it wouldn't be Evangelion , that's for sure. Also: Kaji is such a great character - and his relationship with Misato is so compelling - that I certainly wouldn't complain if he were to survive. However, I wouldn't want Anno and co. sparing him just to please the fans, either. I wouldn't want them to be doing anything just to please the fans, really. Even though they kind of already are. And I will continue, to my dying breath, to defend the EoE hospital scene. It was brilliant. Even if I was too naive to get it the first time I saw it. Send your complaints with Funimation's Rebuild dub scripting to John Burgmeier. No, seriously, do. I agree with you, Gendo ain't no one's "dad".

[]: Post by Sachi » Sun Apr 24, 2011 10:18 pm I don't want to see a happy ending.

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Sun Apr 24, 2011 10:19 pm ^This. Or rather no cheap happy ending.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Sun Apr 24, 2011 10:30 pm Actually, I'd like to see the freakin' Ikaris reconciling. Or, if he's completely beyond redemption, Gendo pulling a heroic sacrifice. Because... EoE showed us the guy cared about Shinji, but Shinji never found out/ got to visibly react to it. Okay, that was part of the "Critical Comunication Failure" premise, but... IOnce is enough.

[]: Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sun Apr 24, 2011 10:52 pm I don't want to see Shinji or Rei in Q. ... Oh, alright, that's not very likely. Scratch that then. Actually I don't want to see nomad Gendo and Fuyu in the desert with donkeys. I hope that frame from the preview remains forever mystifying and unexplained.
